hooks.command: node -e "let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/\bgh\s+(pr|issue)\s+(create|comment|edit)|\bgh\s+pr\s+review\b|\bgit\s+(commit|push|tag)\b/.test(cmd)){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PreToolUse',additionalContext:'Load the github-conventions skill. Use 1./2./3. for numbered lists, never #1/#2/#3. Follow conventional commits for commit messages.'}}));}else{console.log(d)}}catch{console.log(d)}})"

PreToolUse.description: Load github-conventions for write operations (pr/issue create/comment, git commit/push)
